components.name: nui-app
components.description: App shell that activates fixed app-mode layout with header, sidebar, content, and footer regions.

components.name: nui-app-header
components.description: Standardized application top bar with semantic left, center, and right zones.

components.name: nui-sidebar
components.description: Side panel for navigation or secondary controls, with app-mode docking and collapsible behavior.

components.name: nui-content
components.description: Main content wrapper that becomes the scrollable content region in app mode.

components.name: nui-app-footer
components.description: Footer bar that docks in app mode and flows normally in page mode.

components.name: nui-layout
components.description: Constrained responsive layout for equal-width grids and flow-style content arrangements.

components.name: nui-skip-links
components.description: Keyboard-first skip navigation that auto-targets main content or custom anchors.

components.name: nui-column-flow
components.description: Multi-column flow layout used for tree-mode navigation and grouped content blocks.

components.name: nui-button
components.description: Styled wrapper around native buttons, including icon buttons and variant styling.

components.name: nui-button-container
components.description: Layout helper for button groups, spacing, alignment, fill mode, and vertical stacks.

components.name: nui-input-group
components.description: Label and description wrapper for form controls that keeps grouped fields consistent.

components.name: nui-input
components.description: Single-line input wrapper with native validation, clearable mode, and search-friendly variants.

components.name: nui-textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with optional auto-resize and character counting.

components.name: nui-checkbox
components.description: Custom-styled checkbox that preserves native input semantics and form behavior.

components.name: nui-radio
components.description: Custom-styled radio button that keeps the native selection model intact.

components.name: nui-select
components.description: Enhanced select with search, multi-select tags, and accessible custom UI.

components.name: nui-tag-input
components.description: Tag management control with keyboard navigation, editable mode, and hidden-input form support.

components.name: nui-slider
components.description: Custom range slider built on native <input type="range"> and drag utilities.

components.name: nui-dropzone
components.description: Container-scoped drag-and-drop overlay with auto-laid-out named drop zones that activates when files enter the browser window.

components.name: nui-badge
components.description: Inline badge for status, labels, counts, and compact visual indicators.

components.name: nui-card
components.description: Flexible content container for text, media, and action-heavy layouts.

components.name: nui-tabs
components.description: Semantic tabbed interface that upgrades simple markup into accessible tab/panel behavior.

components.name: nui-accordion
components.description: Expandable content sections built on native <details> and <summary>.

components.name: nui-table
components.description: Responsive enhancement layer for standard HTML tables, including mobile-friendly presentation.

components.name: nui-sortable
components.description: Drag-and-drop reordering container using FLIP-style animation and keyboard-aware behavior.

components.name: nui-sortable-item
components.description: Individual draggable item used inside nui-sortable.

components.name: nui-dialog
components.description: Modal and non-modal dialog wrapper, plus system dialog flows like alert, confirm, and prompt.

components.name: nui-overlay
components.description: Raw overlay container for custom modals, busy states, media, and unstyled full-screen layers.

components.name: nui-banner
components.description: Edge-anchored notification surface for passive status and alert messages.

components.name: nui-progress
components.description: Progress indicator for determinate, circular, and busy-state feedback.

components.name: nui-tooltip
components.description: Popover-based tooltip for hover and focus annotations on arbitrary UI elements.

components.name: nui-icon
components.description: SVG sprite-based icon renderer for consistent, scalable interface icons.

components.name: nui-link-list
components.description: Hierarchical navigation list with fold and tree modes plus programmatic data loading.

components.name: nui-markdown
components.description: Markdown renderer with streaming support and syntax highlighting.

components.name: nui-code
components.description: Syntax-highlighted code wrapper used throughout the Playground for examples and snippets.

components.name: nui.util.storage
components.description: Minimal cookie and localStorage helper with TTL support and simple string-based API.

components.name: nui-menu
components.description: Application-style menubar with dropdowns, nested submenus, and full keyboard navigation.

components.name: nui-list
components.description: Virtualized list for large datasets. Requires constrained parent height or flex:1 boundaries.

components.name: nui-lightbox
components.description: Image and media gallery lightbox that supports grouped declarative usage and programmatic opening.

components.name: nui-rich-text
components.description: Native, dependency-free WYSIWYG editor with custom toolbars, multi-directional image resizing, and drag-and-drop.

components.name: nui-code-editor
components.description: Lightweight syntax-highlighted code editor utilizing native overlapping textarea mechanisms.

components.name: nui-app-window
components.description: Desktop-style application window with title bar, status bar, and dark mode support.

components.name: nui-main
components.description: The SPA content mount used by the Playground shell inside nui-content.

components.name: nui-loading
components.description: The global loading bar used in the Playground shell and setup examples.

guides.name: getting-started
guides.description: Setup, layout modes, SPA wiring, and the base shell structure.

guides.name: architecture-patterns
guides.description: Supported SPA patterns and how the router/content loader works.

guides.name: api-structure
guides.description: Maps the three main surfaces: nui, nui.components, and nui.util.

guides.name: declarative-actions
guides.description: The data-action pattern used across the Playground demos.

guides.name: accessibility
guides.description: Accessibility defaults and usage expectations for the component set.

guides.name: utilities
guides.description: Helper functions and utilities for common tasks.

root.name: init
root.description: Auto-called; initializes library and registers custom elements

root.name: registerFeature
root.description: Register a named feature for content routing

root.name: createRouter
root.description: Create a router instance for SPA navigation

root.name: setupRouter
root.description: Setup SPA router with hash-based navigation (replaces enableContentLoading)

components.description: Modal and non-modal dialog wrapper, plus system dialog flows

methods.name: prompt
methods.signature: await nui.components.dialog.prompt(title, message, { fields: [{ id, label, type?, value? }] }, options?)
methods.description: Show prompt dialog, returns object or null

methods.name: page
methods.signature: await nui.components.dialog.page(title, subtitle?, { contentScroll, buttons: [{ label, type, value }] })

components.description: Edge-anchored notification surface

methods.name: show
methods.signature: nui.components.banner.show({ content, placement: 'top'|'bottom', priority: 'info'|'alert', autoClose: ms })

components.description: Hierarchical navigation list with fold and tree modes

methods.name: create
methods.dataFormat: [{ label, icon?, href?, items?: [...] }, { separator: true }]

utilities.name: createElement
utilities.signature: nui.util.createElement(tag, { class, attrs, data, events, content, target })

utilities.name: sortByKey
utilities.description: Sort array by nested property path

router.caching: Pages cached: init() runs ONCE, show()/hide() on navigation
router.scopeRule: Scope DOM to element (page wrapper), never document
